summary: Resolved 7 merge conflicts between feature branch (Tailwind CSS setup) and origin/main (temperatures.json generation). Preserved custom temperature color palette from HEAD in tailwind.config.ts; used origin/main versions for all other files to incorporate newer dependency versions, the scrape script, responsive UI improvements, and proper test setup.
strategyUsed: mixed strategy: chose origin/main for .claude-output.json (latest completed task), index.html (more descriptive meta), package.json (newer deps + scrape script + tsx/cheerio/@types/node), App.tsx (responsive classes + better placeholder), vite.config.ts (proper test-setup.ts reference), package-lock.json (matches resolved package.json); chose HEAD for tailwind.config.ts (preserved essential custom temperature color palette: cold/cool/warm/hot)
